data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time by providing simple interfaces.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Designs interfaces that are easy and quick to navigate.
data.technical_spec: Buttons and menus are strategically sized and placed

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Ensures that the visual design is intuitive and organized.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of proximity and similarity in UI elements

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs align with user expectations from other web experiences.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Designs account for human limits in processing information.
data.technical_spec: Breaks down content into parts and uses progressive disclosure
